name: Honey-Glazed Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl or bag, combine flour, salt and cayenne pepper; add chicken pieces and dredge or shake to coat.
2. Pour 4 tablespoons butter into a 13x9x2-inch baking pan; place chicken in pan, turning once to coat.
3. Bake, uncovered, at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.
4. Combine brown sugar, honey, lemon juice, soy sauce, curry powder and remaining butter; pour over chicken.
5. Bake an additional 45 minutes or until chicken is tender, basting several times with pan drippings.
